arts.sum: Blackpool have lost just once in the best part of two months, but too many draws also mean they've not tasted victory since before Christmas. You have to go back to the middle of October for the last...

arts.ttl: Oxford United set to complete signing of crucial Huddersfield Town player
arts.sum: Oxford United are set to sign Huddersfield Town star Michal Helik, reporter Pete O’Rourke has revealed on X.… The post Oxford United set to complete signing of crucial Huddersfield Town player appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
